title: Feature Importance Analysis: Will They Pay? XGBoost Model

feature_importance.interpretation: Strongest predictor. Patients with longer historical payment delays are more likely to have unpaid invoices.
Larger invoice amounts correlate with different payment likelihood. High-value invoices may receive prioritized payment.
Behavioral consistency (appointment attendance/no-shows) is strongly predictive of invoice payment.
Established patients (longer tenure) are more reliable payers. New patients show higher default risk.
Related to account age; longer relationships predict better payment behavior.
Temporal pattern: invoices created on certain days of the week have different payment rates.
Time-of-day effect on payment behavior (business hours vs. after-hours).
New patient flag; captures risk tier relative to established patients.
How payment was initiated (online, phone, automated) affects collection risk.
ZIP-level aggregate income; weak but present signal. No individual income used.
Day-of-month effect (e.g., invoices mid-month vs. end-of-month).
ZIP-level unemployment rate; weak area-level indicator.
Whether surcharge is applied; minor signal.

Payment History.key_insight: Historical payment behavior dominates. The model learns: 'past behavior predicts future behavior.' Features like days-to-pay, reliability, and tenure are the strongest signals.

Invoice Context.key_insight: Invoice characteristics (amount, timing, origin) are secondary but meaningful. Larger amounts and specific day/time patterns matter.

Census/Area Context.key_insight: ZIP-level public data (income, education, unemployment, poverty) provide weak but consistent signals. No individual-level data used.

Patient Profile.key_insight: New patient status and guardianship have modest predictive value.

recommendations: Monitor disparate impact by ZIP or other segments
Monitor feature importance stability on retrain
Consider removing/reweighting census features if bias signals appear

retraining_guidance.payment_history_features_increase: Temporal patterns are more stable; no action needed.
retraining_guidance.census_features_increase: May signal drift; investigate and reweight if needed.
retraining_guidance.new_features_candidate: Consider behavioral signals like SMS/call responsiveness if deployed.

metadata.notes: XGBoost selected over Logistic Regression and Random Forest for superior discrimination (ROC-AUC 0.9469) and calibrated probability outputs.
